enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Agalaadhe Agalathey?

The song is sung by Vijay Prakash and Megha.

Who composed the music for the movie Settai?

The music was composed by the talented Thaman S.

What is the theme of the song Agalaadhe Agalathey?

The song beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Settai?

The lead actors are Arya and Anjali.

When was the movie Settai released?

The movie was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Agalaadhe Agalathey' from the 2013 Tamil movie 'Settai', starring Arya and Anjali, is a melodious duet that beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Vijay Prakash and Megha, with music composed by Thaman S and lyrics penned by Madhan Karky, the song captures the essence of romantic connection. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it a favorite for moments of reflection and affection. This track is a testament to the film's vibrant and emotional narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Agalaadhe Agalathey, a melodious track from the movie Settai, captivates listeners with its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics. Composed by the talented Thaman S and sung by Vijay Prakash and Megha, this song beautifully portrays the essence of love and longing. Experience the magic of this romantic duet that resonates with emotions and charm.
stanzaMeanings: Don't go away, don't go away, you are beautiful, don't go away. If you leave my sight, life will become difficult.
Don't go away, don't go away, you are beautiful, don't go away.
Every day, the sky flies with a plane, and it is you, you, who is sweet right now.
A sweet kiss today brings a message; if it comes suddenly, it will be a surprise.
Don't go away, don't go away, you are beautiful, don't go away. If you leave my sight, life will become difficult.
In a carefree way, you ask me about love; I am just wondering... you are the honey that I taste and enjoy.
Oh, lovely flower, until you come, there is no joy in life; I am waiting for you, you are shining, and your return will be a great event.
Every day, the sky flies with a plane, and it is you, you, who is sweet right now.
A sweet kiss today brings a message; if it comes suddenly, it will be a surprise.
Like a green leaf in the wind, I have become a cloud of love in my heart because of you.
Don't go away, don't go away, you are beautiful, don't go away. If you leave my sight, life will become difficult.
